nameEN: Fallen of the Dragontree, Solda Zarkab
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.
[AUTO](Back row (RC))1/Turn :When your rear-guard is placed in the front row in the same column as this unit, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts "Divine Sister, Cassatella", draw a card, choose a card from your hand, put it on the bottom of your deck, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row Center RC):When your vanguard is placed on (VC) by the [RevolDress] ability, [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The perfect opponent! I'll respond with all of my wind!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, if that battle's drive check did not reveal a grade 3 card, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire this unit],  choose one of your rear-guards, and [Stand] it.
flavorTextEN: There's no way that I'd fail at such a crucial moment!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.
[AUTO](Back row (RC))1/Turn :When your rear-guard is placed in the front row in the same column as this unit, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](Back Row Center RC):If your vanguard is "Majesty Lord Blaster", this unit gets all of the following.
•[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose up to one "Blaster Blade" and up to one "Blaster Dark" from your soul, and call them to (RC) in the same column as each other.
•[CONT](RC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, all of your grade 2 rear-guards get  "Boost".
flavorTextEN: The Knight of Destiny asks for the qualifications of the encounter in the barrier of time.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.
[AUTO](Back Row RC)1/Turn :When your rear-guard is placed in the front row of the same column as this unit, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: A fallen spawn of the Dragontree. Drown in greed and trample down the path of barbarity.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Sage of Robust, Stogron", you declare either normal unit or trigger unit, and reveal the top card of your deck. If you revealed a card type you declared, you may put it into your hand. If you did not put it into your hand, put that revealed card into your soul or on the top of your deck.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Solrairon" in its card name, choose up to one normal unit from your hand, and reveal it. If you revealed a card, draw a card, and put that revealed card on the top of your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC):At the end of your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Gramgrace" in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], choose a grade 3 unit card from your soul, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Keep on flying! Going more higher!

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC):When your other unit [Stand] by your card's ability, COST  [put this unit into soul], choose one of the units that was [Stand], and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](Back Row Center RC):If your vanguard is "Majesty Lord Blaster", this unit gets all of the following.
•[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose up to one "Blaster Blade" and up to one "Blaster Dark" from your soul, and call them to (RC) in the same column as each other.
•[CONT](RC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, all of your grade 2 rear-guards get  "Boost".
flavorTextEN: The Knight of Destiny asks for the qualifications of the encounter in the barrier of time.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from deck, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, COST  [discard a card from hand], choose one of your vanguards, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for every two of that unit's grade.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top or bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other grade 1 or less unit is placed on (RC) from deck, you may put that unit into the soul. If you put a card, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a rear-guard, if you have a grade 3 or greater [Stand] vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top two cards of your deck, choose up to two cards from among them, put them on the top of your deck in any order, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a grade 3 or greater unit, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If you played a normal order this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], search your deck or drop for up to one "Uplifting Hymn", reveal it and put it into hand, and if you searched the deck, shuffle the deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from deck, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Knowledge is infinite. Thus the boy devotes himself to studying day and night.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) or (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire another rear-guard], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets drive +1 until end of turn.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your rear-guard was retired this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: There was once a knight that wielded the blade of determination in the shadows of glory.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire another rear-guard], look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 1 or less unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I know! That this will hit for sure!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have three or more grade 3 units, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1) & call a grade 1 from your hand to (RC)], and the unit called for this cost gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The golden wind that races through the lands inspires the heart of those who glimpse upon it.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & [Rest] another rear-guard], reveal the top card of your deck, put it into your hand if it is an order card or a grade 3, and call it to (RC) if it isn't.
flavorTextEN: We are here. You don't have to worry anymore.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Apex Ruler, Bastion", COST  [reveal three grade 3 cards from your hand], and draw a card.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have three or more grade 3 units, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Leave the rest to us. We'll definitely protect you.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two cards from among them, put them on the top of your deck in any order, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Hexaorb Sorceress", look at three cards from the top of your deck, and put them on the top of your deck in any order.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top or bottom of your deck. If you put it on the bottom of your deck, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Do not fear the unknown. Have faith in the courage you hold.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your damage zone has no face up cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your hand, put it into your soul, and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if it is boosted, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'm leaving my six to you! I'll settle it with this guy first!!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress" or "Pentagleam Sorceress", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at two cards from the top of your deck, and put them on the top of your deck in any order.
[CONT](RC/GC):If your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress", this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on your opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have three or more grade 3 units, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [put a unit card from your drop into your soul], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one card from among them with the same card name as the card put into your soul for this cost, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: (D-BT03): I'll end it before you can feel the pain.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two cards from among them, put them on the top of your deck in any order, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Will it go smoothly? That's where we work hard!

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Put this unit into your soul & [Rest] another rear-guard], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose any number of grade 3 cards from among them, reveal them and put them into your hand, and discard the rest.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & [Rest] another rear-guard], reveal the top card of your deck, put it into your hand if it is an order card or a grade 3, and call it to (RC) if it isn't.
flavorTextEN: We are here. You don't have to worry anymore.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) by your card's cost, look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one card with "Blaster" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your damage zone has no face up cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, COST  [put a card from your hand into your soul], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: If one wishes to receive good fortune, they must also possess the means to make use of it.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, if you have another grade 3 unit in the same column as this unit, this unit gets grade +1/[Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress" or "Pentagleam Sorceress", COST  [discard a card from your hand], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two cards from among them, put them on the top of your deck in any order, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. This unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Put this unit into your soul & [Rest] another rear-guard], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose any number of grade 3 cards from among them, reveal them and put them into your hand, and discard the rest.
flavorTextEN: A competent sniper capable of accurately sniping from any position.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) for the cost of your card, look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one card with "Blaster" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: To bring down with certainty. That is the reason for the existence of the shadow knights.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Look at the top of your deck, put it on the top or bottom of your deck, and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: In the future that you see, what you take hold of depends on you.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit is retired from (RC) for the cost of your vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and put this card into your hand.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your damage zone has a face up card, COST  [put a trigger unit from your hand into your damage zone face down], choose a face up card from your damage zone, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: It'll end quickly. Bear with it.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if two or more rear-guards were retired for the cost of your card with "Blaster" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+10000.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress" or "Pentagleam Sorceress", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at two cards from the top of your deck, and put them on the top of your deck in any order.
[CONT](RC/GC):If your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress", this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000. (Active on your opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: Teachings from the great master number one! Change your future yourself!

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard's clan is only《Shadow Paladin》, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put one card from your hand into your soul], and draw two cards.
flavorTextEN: The witch converted the cumulation of regrets into power for revenge.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it. If you did not retire, draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's grade 2 or greater rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: The sword of bravery that advanced without fear became the light that brought hope.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, if you have another grade 3 unit in the same column as this unit, this unit gets grade +1/[Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll be troubled if Cloud Knights were underestimated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress" or "Pentagleam Sorceress", COST  [discard a card from your hand], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two cards from among them, put them on the top of your deck in any order, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. This unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: To make it shine ever brighter "from now on".

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: A blade of evil thoughts will never reach this body.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if two or more rear-guards were retired for the cost of your card with "Blaster" in its card name this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: The resolve of compatriots will become the strength to hold this blade.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) during your main phase, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 2 or less unit card with "Blaster" in its card name, call it to (RC) and shuffle your deck. If your called, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul blast (1)], search your deck for up to one "Knight of Friendship, Kay", call it to a (RC) in the same column as this unit, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The tale of his way of life dedicated to loyalty has been passed down to future generations.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 3 with "Thegrea" in its card name, look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Thegrea" or "Maple" in its card name from among it, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: These are the results of training. let's keep going!

effectEN:
[CONT](Front Row RC):All of your rear-guards with different card names as this unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you persona rode this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you rode a grade 3 or greater this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your damage zone has three or more cards, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: If I scatter this many, I'm sure one of them will work ♪

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your rear-guard was retired by your vanguard's ability this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, if this unit was boosted, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: If I'm together with you, we should be able to grab hold of a beautiful future.

effectEN:
[CONT](Front Row RC):All of your rear-guards with different card names from this unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you persona rode this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: A flashing strike with all my might shall pierce through your darkenss.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) during your main phase, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 2 or less unit card with "Blaster" in its card name from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck. If your called, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: The passing wind calls upon heroes.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you rode a grade 3 or greater this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Now, let us fill the world with light.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your damage zone has three or more cards, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: If I scatter this many, I'm sure one of them will work ♪

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your rear-guard was retired by your vanguard's ability this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The arrow bends and sings of sorrow. This is an elegy for my brethren.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one unit card with "Blaster" in its card name from among them, call it to (RC) or reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you put a card into your hand, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
[AUTO](RC):When your unit with "Blaster" in its card name attacks, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The brilliant pride still lies in the knights' hearts.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a unit with the [RevolDress] ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 2 or greater card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
[AUTO](VC/RC):When this unit is boosted, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The light from the skies. I used to believe that it was the path that knights should follow.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have a vanguard with "Youthberk" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Proceed if that is your justice; the path that you have chosen

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard is placed by the [RevolDress] ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.

[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, if you have four or more units, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 2 or greater unit card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you did not reveal, draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if you have a card with "RevolForm" in its card name in your soul, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this COST  [Counter Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with the [RevolDress] ability!
Search your deck for up to one "Youthberk "RevolForm: Zest"", reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have a vanguard with "Youth" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Youth" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The absolute law of the sky. To crush it, the skyfall knight stands.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard is placed by the [RevolDress] ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Are you ready to experience the separation of the head from the body?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, if you have four or more units, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], look at three cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one grade 2 or greater unit card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you did not reveal, draw a card.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], reveal the top of your deck, and put it into your hand if it's a normal unit. (Return it to its original spot if it's not)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 card with "Youthberk" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, shuffle your deck, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if your vanguard was placed by riding from a grade 3 this turn, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Nothing can be protected if you do not have the strength. Hence my presence here.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC)1/Turn :When this unit is chosen by the ability of your grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and Counter Charge (1). If this unit's [Power] was increased by a trigger effect this turn, draw a card.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard has "Sorceress" in its card name, look at two cards from the top of your deck, put them on the top of your deck in any order, and Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Singing clearly into the skies, the four chants that reel in the future.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two from among them, put them into your hand, and put the rest on the top of your deck in any order. If you put two cards into your hand, choose a card from your hand, and put it on the bottom of your deck.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you persona rode this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The light gathers, as the future rest upon these hands.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your soul has a grade 3 or greater card, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: It feels a little prickly, right? That's the weight of your sins♪

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, if you have four or more units, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], look at the top three cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 2 or greater unit card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you did not reveal, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Is the duty of a knight to protect the law? No! It is to protect the lives of the people!

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have three or more grade 3 or greater units, COST  [retire this unit], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it on the bottom of their deck.
flavorTextEN: No matter the reason, you shall not pass here.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your [Critical]2 or greater vanguard attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: So you're planning the ambush here? Allow me to join you.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit is retired from (RC) for the cost of your vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and put this card into your hand.
flavorTextEN: Even if everyone is gone, I'll still be by your side.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC)1/Turn :When this unit is chosen by the ability of your grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and Counter Charge (1). If this unit's [Power] was increased by a trigger effect this turn, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Transmit good luck and open the gates to a new path.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits a vanguard, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it on the bottom of their deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], look at the top three cards of your deck, choose a card from among them, reveal it, call it to (RC) if it is a grade 2 or less unit card, and put it into your hand if it isn't. Shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This flash of light shall become the first strike to shatter the skies.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if you have a card with "RevolForm" in its card name in your soul, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Strong and sincere. The dragon stands to protect the people.

effectEN:
Play this COST  [Counter Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with the [RevolDress] ability!
Search your deck for up to one "Youthberk "RevolForm: Zest"", reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The dark knight is said to wield the power of a lost technique, capable of transcending time.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by a card's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Now, who do I need to beat up!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have a vanguard with "Youth" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: You want to protect here, right? Why not come along with us?
